hero.title: Car Towing anywhere in Belgium, available
hero.subtitle: Car trouble? Breakdown, accident, or flat battery: our team of experts intervenes quickly to safely tow your vehicle.

services.subtitle: No matter the problem, we have the equipment and expertise to get you back on the road.

depannage.title: Breakdown Service
depannage.desc: On-site diagnosis and repair when possible. Our technician identifies the problem and tries to get you back on the road quickly.

remorquage.title: Towing
remorquage.desc: Safe transport of your vehicle to the garage of your choice.

batterie.title: Flat Battery
batterie.desc: Jump start with professional booster or on-site battery replacement.

accident.title: Breakdown & Accident
accident.desc: Emergency intervention in case of accident or unforeseen breakdown. Securing the vehicle and towing if necessary.

portiere.title: Door Opening
portiere.desc: Keys locked inside? We open your door without damage, quickly and safely.

step1.title: Call us
step1.desc: Only one number to remember: 0483 02 08 20. Available day and night, including weekends and holidays.

step2.title: We're on our way
step2.desc: Our closest tow truck is dispatched immediately. Average response time under 45 minutes.

step3.title: Problem solved
step3.desc: On-site repair or towing to the garage of your choice. You are never left stranded.

coverageZone.subtitle: Our fleet of tow trucks is strategically distributed to guarantee an intervention within 45 minutes anywhere in the country.

speed.title: Fast intervention
speed.desc: Average arrival time under 45 minutes across our entire area.

area.title: Wallonia & Flanders
area.desc: Complete coverage of both regions. Highways and secondary roads.

price.title: Transparent pricing
price.desc: Quote provided by phone before intervention. No hidden fees.
